positive: A retro synthwave landscape illustration. Neon grid lines stretch across a stylized sunset over a futuristic cityscape. Include geometric shapes, palm tree silhouettes, and a deep gradient wash of magenta, cyan, and electric purple. Vector art style, 80s vaporwave aesthetic, high contrast, suitable for apparel.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements
